# flashblade_syslog_server (Data Source)

Reads an existing FlashBlade syslog server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_syslog_server" "example" {
  name = "existing-syslog"
}

output "syslog_server_uri" {
  value = data.flashblade_syslog_server.example.uri
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the syslog server to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the syslog server.
- `services` (List of String) List of services configured for this syslog server.
- `sources` (List of String) List of sources configured for this syslog server.
- `uri` (String) Syslog server URI in format PROTOCOL://HOST:PORT.
